title: Vertical Slab's Vertical Slabs
description: Finally adds vertical slabs into Minecraft
body:
# Vertical Slabs (Forge 1.20.1) - Archived

Adds **vertical slabs** for many vanilla blocks like wood and stone.

## Features

- Vertical slab variants for vanilla slabs  
- Accurate collision and placement behavior  
- Works in survival and creative modes  
- **Very** experimental and will probably not be updated as I only made this as an AP Java project

## Compatibility

Made for **Forge 1.20.1**  

## License
